_format.note: Voice-style placeholder prose for the dossier and battle log. Inline markup: ~~strike~~ for double-strike, [[N]] for an N-char redaction bar, **gold** for the gold accent. All prose is lowercase.
_format.lookup: Dossier reads: subtitles[species] || subtitles[type]; notes[species] || notes[type]. Battle log reads: actions[abilityKey].use || actionDefaults[element].use; same for hit/flavor. effectDefaults[kind] is consulted when an ability has no damage. afflictions[statusKey].apply / .tick are read on apply / per-turn-tick.
_format.templates: {actor} = lowercased name of the doer. {target} = lowercased name of the receiver. {name} = ability display name (lowercased). {status} = lowercased affliction name.

subtitles.fire: something is wrong with its heat.
subtitles.water: it is dry to the touch. it should not be.
subtitles.grass: it has been waiting longer than i have.
subtitles.light: it does not warm what it lights.
subtitles.Emberkin: it does not warm me when i hold it.
subtitles.Ashmaw: i think it has eaten before.
subtitles.Cinderling: it should have gone out by now.
subtitles.Magmaw: older than the room. older than the floor.
subtitles.Charnel: i should not look at it directly.
subtitles.Mireling: i found it where i had left no print.
subtitles.Loamback: i mistook it for a stone. then for a face.
subtitles.Sproutkin: it is small. it is opening.
subtitles.Vinewyrm: it is crossing the room slowly.
subtitles.Bloomback: it is in flower. that is wrong.
subtitles.Dawnstag: it knows when the dawn was.
subtitles.Halowyrm: the light it makes is not clean.
subtitles.Glimmerfox: i never saw it begin to move.
subtitles.Voidling: there is a small empty place.

fire: it ~~burns~~ smolders where i did not light it.
i feel its heat after it has gone.
it does not warm me. it warms what i was.
water: i hear ~~water~~ something running near it.
grass: where i did not plant, it grows.
it is older than the ground it stands on.
light: it is too ~~bright~~ clear to look at directly.
the light it makes is not clean.
i can still see it when i ~~close~~ shut my eyes.
dark: it has been here longer than i thought.
it does not require my eyes to see me.
Emberkin: i found it ~~burning~~ glowing in the stove ash.
it does not consume what it touches. yet.
it watches what i feed it. it ~~knows~~ remembers the smaller things.
Tidewhelp: it is dry to the touch. always dry.
i hear ~~water~~ something running near where it sleeps.
i have begun to follow streams the way it does.
Loamback: i mistook it for a stone. then for ~~moss~~ a face.
it grows ~~quietly~~ patiently even when held.
the ground misses it when it leaves the room.
Lumenpup: it is warm. it should be warmer.
it makes shadows. it does not cast them.
i cannot see it when i ~~close my eyes~~ try to remember it.
Pyrelord: it is the older one. it knows.
the heat in this room has always been its.
Magmaw: it has been ~~burning~~ here for a very long time.
when it opens, i can hear something inside.
the floor is darker where it has stood.
Charnel: i do not write what it eats.
the room is colder when it leaves.
it ~~remembers~~ knows the small soft things.
Deepmaw: it has been waiting longer than the room has existed.
when i look at it, i look at something further down.
Hollowoak: i can hear something inside it. there is nothing inside it.
it has been here longer than the others.
it does not move. that is what it does.
Glimmerfox: it is faster than i am.
i am not certain it was ever here.
i write its name and i think of someone else.
Voidling: there is a place where it should be.
i can see what is behind it. it is not behind it.
i mark its **name** on the page so i remember it exists.
Wraithfin: it ~~is~~ has been here a moment longer than i have looked.
i can see through it where i do not want to.
it does not breathe. it does not need to.
Umbragale: the wind in this room has been wrong since it arrived.
i can hear another room when it is near.
the page lifts when it has not.
Nightcreep: it is closer than it was.
i did not see it move.
i should not have written this down.
Aurabeast: the room is brighter where it has been.
it does not eat. it has been here this long.
i think it has been writing me down.
Halowyrm: the light it carries hurts to look at, but i look.
it is long. longer than the room.
when it speaks i ~~hear~~ remember it.
Dawnstag: it knows what time the room was.
i have not seen morning since it arrived.
i cannot tell if its antlers are growing.
Bloomback: it is in flower in this room. that is wrong.
the flowers are open at me.
i ~~picked~~ took one. i should not have.
Vinewyrm: it is moving slowly across the floor.
i write while it moves. i feel the page tighten.
i was here. now i am closer to the wall.
Mosshorn: it was a stone for a long time. it is not now.
the ground beneath where it stood is colder.
Thornling: it is small. i should be able to hold it.
when i tried, my hands ~~bled~~ remembered.
it does not mean to. i think.
Sproutkin: it is opening. that is what it is doing.
i do not know what is inside.
Shadowmaw: it is low to the floor.
it has been listening for a long time.
i think it is waiting for me to ~~speak~~ say its name.
Brineback: it is heavy. heavier than it should be.
i feel water beneath it where there should not be.
i think it has been here before. in a different room.
Coralhusk: i do not touch it directly.
Frostfin: i do not remember catching it. i think i found it.
i feel the cold in the room growing where it has been.
Mireling: it leaves no print where i can see it.
i found it under what i had not lifted.
i do not know what it is small for.
Rivergeist: it is going somewhere. it has been going there for a while.
it does not stay where i set it down.
i hear water in the wrong direction.
Soothlick: i feel calm in its presence. i should not.
when it has gone, i remember less of the day.
Ashmaw: it has eaten before. i do not know what.
the corners of the room are darker where it has fed.
i write while it watches the page.
Cinderling: it should have gone out by now.
i fed it nothing. it is still warm.
i think it has been the same one. all of them.

passives.brutal: it does not measure how hard.
passives.thick_hide: it arrives heavier than it left.
passives.tide_guard: the water answers when it asks.
passives.iron_grip: once it has hold of a thing.
passives.tide_blessed: the salt does not leave it.
passives.verdant_soul: green does not heal it. it heals green.
passives.sunforged: hammered out of a brighter place.
passives.shadowforged: hammered out of where light is not.
passives.tempo: keeps a meter i cannot follow.
passives.lightbearer: walks ahead of its own glow.
passives.soul_drain: takes a small piece each strike.
passives.vampire_touch: every hit is a small drink.
passives.second_wind: stands once after it has fallen.
passives.warm_blood: resists the cold that comes after.
passives.iron_will: does not bend where others would.
passives.hex_eater: swallows what is laid upon it.
passives.frostbite: cold spreads from where it touches.
passives.patient_hunter: waits longer than it needs to.
passives.echo_form: repeats the last sound i made.
passives.dreadful: i do not want to look at it.
passives.lucky: the dice do not catch it.
passives.savage: does not stop at the kill.

events.swap_in: {actor} steps forward to take its place.
events.swap_none: {actor} ~~tries~~ has no one to swap to.
events.swap_curse: the name takes from {actor} on the way out.
